meaning: n.(欧洲产的)莺类,白颊鸟类,[植]美国产的黑色覆盆子
examples: Southern United States chickadee similar to the blackcap but smaller.
A few — such as the Blackcap — have started to adapt by spending winters in Britain, but such behaviour remains exceptional, the study said.
The blackcap (Sylvia atricapilla), a migrant bird common in Europe that breeds in gardens, once had virtually no avian malaria but a study in 1999 showed nearly 4% had the disease.
